TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ruisui, title = Ruisui, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ruisui} }

S.FORM: Ruisui (ÁĎěÁ©óťĄČ, Hamicho go) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 151.59 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 57.39 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 7.4 km¬≤), 9,520 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,717 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,438 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 47%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Sakizaya ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Ruisui ays psgayun 11 ru 16 alang. 16 alang hani ga, Langas , Lacihakan , Morocan , Atolan , Koyo , Ukang , Narowan , Kalala , Sapat , Maifor , Olalip , Fanaw , Olaw , Marorok , Cirocan , Kiwit .

Ruisui (ÁĎěÁ©óťĄČ, Hamicho go) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 151.59 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 57.39 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 7.4 km¬≤), 9,520 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,717 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,438 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 47%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Sakizaya ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Ruisui ays psgayun 11 ru 16 alang. 16 alang hani ga, Langas , Lacihakan , Morocan , Atolan , Koyo , Ukang , Narowan , Kalala , Sapat , Maifor , Olalip , Fanaw , Olaw , Marorok , Cirocan , Kiwit .
S.PHON: ruis~…ēui (***, ńßami ¶~ ®ńßo …£o) mki s~…ēku ńßualien. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.* km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na amis~…ē, s~…ēakizaja ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. s~…ēinpŇčan s~…ēeńßu s~…ē Ēuli s~…ēku s~…ēańßuj …£o. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u ruis~…ēui ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun ** ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, laŇčas~…ē , la ¶~ ®ińßakan , moro ¶~ ®an , atolan , kojo , ukaŇč , narowan , kalala , s~…ēapat , mai*or , olalip , *anaw , olaw , marorok , ¶~ ®iro ¶~ ®an , kiwit .
